name: rate-engine
author: Christian Paul (https://github.com/cpauldev)
description: RateEngine is a client-agnostic, multi-stage rate limiting policy engine for TypeScript, powered by `@upstash/ratelimit`. It helps you define Redis-backed rate limit buckets, enforce ordered policy pipelines, choose fail-open or fail-closed behavior, and return standard HTTP rate-limit responses with minimal route-handler boilerplate.

scripts.test:smoke: bun -e "const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); for (const key of ['RateEngine','getRateLimitHeaders','toRateLimitResponse','toOAuthSlowDownResponse']) { if (typeof mod[key] !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing export: ' + key); }"
